visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a large warehouse retail setting, likely a Costco, characterized by tall industrial shelving stacked with bulk goods. A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white puffed-sleeve shirt under a black vest, stands in an aisle. She holds a large purple product box featuring taro coconut soup and gestures toward the camera with an expressive face and hand movements. The lighting is bright and typical of a commercial warehouse. (2) The camera transitions to high-granularity close-ups of the product packaging, which displays high-resolution images of a bowl of purple taro soup with oats. Details like the brand name 'Great Day' and 'Quaker' are visible. A shot of the store shelf shows a yellow price tag of 399. The camera work is handheld but stable, focusing on the text and ingredient illustrations. (3) The scene shifts to a well-lit indoor living room. Two women, including the one from the warehouse, sit at a table. The second woman has bangs and wears a teal turtleneck. They are shown tasting the product from small black bowls using plastic spoons. Their facial expressions are animated and joyful as they give thumbs up and point to the ingredients in the bowls. Plush toys and a sofa are visible in the background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 話題必買新品. (2) [Subtitle]: 芋頭燕麥椰奶露. (3) [Subtitle]: 他竟然出了甜點. (4) [Subtitle]: 而且他加桂格燕麥. (5) [Subtitle]: 399元. [Variety]: 最新上的. (6) [Variety]: 滿分10分!. (7) [Variety]: 超級驚豔的甜點. (8) [Slogan]: 推薦給你們沒有葉配真的好吃.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male passerby blurred in the background aisle.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long black hair in a white shirt and black vest; another woman with straight bangs in a dark teal turtleneck.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Industrial warehouse shelves with bulk products and domestic living room with table and plush decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins a rapid, high-energy narration with a bright, conversational tone. The background music is an upbeat electronic pop track with a persistent, steady beat. The acoustic environment is clean with minimal room tone. (2) A distinct 'ding' sound effect triggers a new phase as price information is discussed. The narrator’s pitch variability increases to emphasize the product's value. The upbeat BGM maintains a constant tempo in the background. (3) The audio shifts to a dual-vocal conversation between two women. Their speech is characterized by high arousal and positive valence. Frequent short, percussive sounds of spoons clinking against ceramic bowls are heard over the BGM. (4) A bubbly 'pop' sound effect occurs as the women give their final recommendation. The speech rate remains fast, and the music swells slightly before a hard cut at the end of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves to introduce and review a new taro coconut dessert found at Costco. By combining on-site shopping footage with an at-home taste test, the creators demonstrate the product's practical features, value for money, and sensory appeal to encourage their audience to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The narrator explicitly states 'no sponsorship' (沒有葉配) at the end of the video.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Typical social-media review style with high visual/audio density to maintain user attention.
